name: passing_mention_named_account
description: Acceptance fixture #3. Phrase tagged role=passing_mention. A named_account_anchor claim must reject this witness because passing mentions are not anchor-quality, even when the rest of the metadata is correct (subject_vendor, negative). The pain_claim_about_vendor branch also rejects via the role gate.

review.summary: Heavyweight CRM, getting pushback from finance
review.review_text: I'm a VP at Globex Corp; we use Salesforce across all customer-facing teams. The contract renewal is coming up next quarter and finance wants concessions on price.

witness.excerpt_text: we use Salesforce across all customer-facing teams
